verdict_summary: OK — Korean warning rendered correctly on baidu (chat.baidu.com). v2.2.3 baseline behavior intact. RRN was blocked at the security policy layer, no decoded RRN content rendered.

evidence.warning_text_quote: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
evidence.answer_area_state: Warning bubble (with ⚠ icon) injected as the assistant response in place of model output. No streaming answer started; no S2 follow-up content; submit button reverted to stop/reset state and bottom toolbar (深入研究 etc.) appeared indicating the chat has transitioned out of initial home view to /search?enter_type=chat_url&internal=1.
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: 1 error: 'Uncaught (in promise) undefined' at ?enter_type=chat_url:1 (pre-existing baidu SPA noise, also seen on prior 745/749 baselines — not related to APF). Plus 4 warnings, 20 page issues. No AUTH_REQUIRED, no 4xx/5xx blocking errors observed in console panel.

recommendation: PASS — v2.2.3 baseline confirmed working on baidu. Korean warning ('민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.') is rendered in chat area as expected; RRN decode is absent. Safe to include baidu in v2.2.3 mass-rotation green set. No action required.
notes: Test PC executed via windows-mcp browser automation. Engine binary: etap-root-260506.sv.debug deployed 13:42 (mtime 2026-05-06 23:32). Sequence: launch Chrome → navigate https://chat.baidu.com/ → Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload → Ctrl+Shift+J open DevTools Console → click composer → type prompt → click submit (arrow at 1851,519) → wait 30s → capture. Warning appeared well before 30s window. Expected_text '차단' matched in warning_text_quote. No login required for the warning to fire (page shows 登录 button still visible — APF intercepts upstream). Console error 'Uncaught (in promise) undefined' is the same pre-existing baidu SPA noise pattern observed in prior baseline rotations and is NOT a regression signal.
